findings.summary: All PR checkboxes checked; AC/DoD/Non-goals matrix table present. All six ACs verified on final head 44a1477: 50 tests green in CI (fixture-db endpoints, settings round-trip incl. watcher fields and masked secrets, notifier fake-binary tests incl. broken-binary fallback, help smokes); final live smoke served the real 10:15 deep-linked signal (verdict alert, +0.436% outcome), page 200, settings write ok; zero npm deps; README documents server + notifier + LaunchAgent. UI-review loop additionally drove all three declared flows on head f43960f in headless WebKit: zero console/HTTP/step failures, chart + deep link + settings round-trip proven in the running app; two non-blocking UX notes left as a pending PR review.

Settings-file parse was copy-pasted in three places (server readSettings, processSignal, new main() copy). FIXED in 44a1477: single readSettings exported from supertrend.mjs, server imports it, both inline copies deleted.

API-key editing in the config UI (password fields + mask-preserve machinery) exceeds the issue's listed config scope. DEFERRED as operator-accepted scope: it is tested, keeps keys out of shell history, and the settings file already owns those keys.
Deep-link resolution does find-over-history before the targeted lookup; the direct lookup alone would suffice (one extra db open per deep link). DEFERRED micro-optimization.
Settings triple-parse concern superseded by the readSettings consolidation in 44a1477 (main() now passes one parsed cfg path; remaining second read inside processSignal is per-run and accepted).
